_comment: LISTENING RENDER for the opened ranges (spec 2026-07-21). Records 8 s of the storm, then visits each newly reachable extreme in turn with everything else parked, so each one can be judged on its own rather than as a blend. Synth silenced throughout.

events._comment: 10-25s: MOTION opens to full. THE FOG QUESTION -- scatter now spans the whole buffer instead of a quarter.
25-40s: SIZE to the new top. One grain covers the whole loop under one window.
40-52s: SIZE to the new bottom. Should stop being a texture and become a pitched buzz.
52-66s: pitch (lane 2, LANE_PITCH) to both new extremes, SIZE back to the familiar middle.

66-78s: resonance at maximum, cutoff swept. set_resonance/set_filt do not exist as scenario actions -- the reader (host/render/scenario.cpp) only has set_voice_resonance/set_voice_filt, which Part forwards to BOTH engines (Part::set_voice_resonance/set_voice_filt call _synth AND _sampler); with the synth silenced above, only the sampler's SVF is heard. set_voice_resonance clamps internally to SamplerEngine's 0.9 ceiling (sampler_engine.cpp:465), so the requested 1.0 lands at the real maximum.
